master_row.title: Magnetic Helicity Evolution Evolution Relation
master_row.canonical_statement: \textbf{Theorem (Woltjer, 1958)}: In ideal MHD with $\vec{E} + \vec{v} \times \vec{B} = 0$, helicity is conserved: \begin{equation} \frac{d\mathcal{H}_M}{dt} = 0 \end{equation}
master_row.formation_note: Recovered from a D:\All source document under ‘Magnetic Helicity’.
master_row.dictionary: Theorem (Woltjer, 1958): In ideal MHD with E + v × B = 0, helicity is conserved
master_row.encyclopedia: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `D:\00_Engine\CSV\concept_units.csv` for registry alignment and later derivation.
